name: Dr. Sarah Jenkins, DDS
bio: Graduated from NYU College of Dentistry with over 12 years of experience in aesthetic treatments and advanced implantology.

name: Dr. Aris Thorne, DMD
bio: Earned his degree from Harvard Dental Medicine, specializing in minimally invasive extractions and modern bone grafting.

name: Marcus Vance, RDH
bio: Passionate about preventative care, patient education, and providing a gentle, anxiety-free cleaning experience.

name: Elena Rostova
bio: Ensures seamless clinical workflows and helps patients comfortably manage their customized long-term treatment plans.

name: Chloe Bennett
bio: Oversees day-to-day operations with a warm smile, assisting patients with scheduling, insurance claims, and flexible financing.
